spec.template.spec.securityContext.runAs.security_impact: Non-root reduces blast radius of container escape across all replicas

spec.template.spec.automountServiceAccou.security_impact: Auto-mounted tokens give every replica pod API credentials

spec.template.spec.hostNetwork.security_impact: Host network in replicated workloads multiplies attack surface

spec.template.spec.containers.security_impact: All replicas inherit the container security context

spec.template.spec.resources.limits.security_impact: Limits on templates apply to every replica pod

spec.template.spec.securityContext.runAs.security_impact: Root jobs can write to host volumes and modify system files

spec.template.spec.hostPID.security_impact: Host PID allows node process inspection

spec.template.spec.containers.security_impact: Each container should have security context defined

spec.template.spec.resources.limits.security_impact: Unbounded jobs can exhaust node resources

spec.concurrencyPolicy.security_impact: Allow permits unbounded concurrent runs — resource exhaustion risk

spec.jobTemplate.spec.template.spec.secu.security_impact: Containers running as root increase blast radius
